Official Educational Briefing

Federal Benefits
Masterclass:
Weber State University

A comprehensive briefing on FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and Social Security for Northern Utah Federal Employees.

Trust Signal Fiduciary Excellence
Track Record 500+ Feds Served
Event Type No-Cost Educational
Limited Seating

Secure Your Briefing

Complimentary admission for federal employees and spouses.

Privacy Protected & No-Obligation Educational Event

Curriculum

Mastering the Legacy of Your Service

"Your federal benefits are more than a paycheck; they are a multi-generational legacy that requires active stewardship."

CH. 01

FERS Optimization & The Three-Legged Stool

Analyzing the critical interplay between your pension, Social Security, and TSP. We solve the 'gap' calculation that many Feds miss during early retirement planning.

Pension Logic FERS vs CSRS
CH. 02

TSP Management & The SDBA Window

Moving beyond the L-Funds. Learn how the Mutual Fund Window and Self-Directed Brokerage Account (SDBA) can provide professional-grade portfolio management within the TSP.

SDBA Logic Asset Allocation
CH. 03

FEGLI vs. Private Alternatives

Is FEGLI Option B draining your retirement income? We perform a side-by-side cost analysis of federal life insurance versus private market precision alternatives.

Cost Analysis Risk Strategy
CH. 04

FEHB & Medicare Coordination

The definitive guide to Part B. When to keep FEHB, when to suspend it, and how to avoid the lifetime penalties while maximizing coverage for your spouse.

Health Coverage Part B Strategy

Voice of Authority

"Host of Retire Right Radio, heard weekly on Northern Utah airwaves."

Your Briefing Officer

Mike Stevens,
CFP®, RICP®

Mike has dedicated over two decades to navigating the complex corridors of federal retirement. As a Certified Financial Planner™ and Retirement Income Certified Professional®, he brings a surgical level of precision to FERS and TSP analysis.

✓

Independent Fiduciary

✓

Host of Retire Right Radio on KSL & KNRS

✓

Specialized in Utah's federal corridor (Hill AFB / IRS)

Location

Weber State University
Davis Campus

📍 2750 University Park Blvd, Layton, UT 84041

📅 Multiple Sessions Available

🅿️ Complimentary Parking

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this affiliated with OPM?

No, this is an independent educational seminar. We provide non-biased, fiduciary guidance that is not limited by government handbook scripts.

Can I bring my spouse?

Absolutely. In fact, we encourage it. Retirement is a joint legacy decision, especially regarding FEHB and Survivor Benefits.

Will I be sold financial products?

This session is purely educational. No financial products will be offered or sold during the seminar. Our goal is clarity, not solicitation.

Register for the Briefing
